title: Week 1 Recap & New Website Launch
author: BBurkk
body:
Gentlemen,

Thanks to everyone who came out last week — great turnout!

Moving forward, all league information will live on our new website, built by our friend and CTO, Michael Spasiano. Huge thanks to him for putting in the work and getting all the data dialed in — it looks fantastic. You'll find recaps, scoring, the leaderboard, and everything else you need right there, so these emails will be a thing of the past. But don't fret, they will be reborn on the site, BETTER THAN EVER!!!

For subs, please continue using the league email to reach out.

A few quick rule reminders:

• Out of bounds (white stakes): Stroke and distance — re-hit from the original spot, no advancement. Penalty stroke added.

• Hazards (red stakes): One stroke penalty, then drop with distance.

• Tee shot OB: You can either hit 3 from the tee, or take stroke and distance and hit 4 from the spot the ball crossed the OB line (no closer to the hole).

We're playing standard USGA rules otherwise. If you have any questions, just let us know.

Skins must be a natural birdie or better (gross score, not net). CTPs must be on the first shot — no re-tees.

We track three things: individual points, team points (your individual points combined with your partner's), and the $5 buy-in CTP/SKINs money game. $55 in each pot heading into Week 2.

Looking forward to seeing everyone this week — weather looks great and carts are confirmed.

Big thanks again to Michael for the site. Couldn't do it without you, buddy.

God bless,

Your Co-Commish,

BBurkk
